backend/main.mo: Main actor defining all data types (farmer profiles, produce listings, institutions, assistance requests, compensation, PF accounts, chat) and their corresponding storage maps with CRUD operations, including blob storage and access control mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state to new version by adding optional blob fields (profilePicture, listingImage, videoTour) to farmer profiles and produce listings, and adding IDs to requests.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (salary dashboard, insurance tracking, PF management, assistance requests) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages (home, dashboard, marketplace, registration forms, salary/PF views), components (cards, forms, layout), hooks (React Query), and data files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color tokens for UI elements (background, foreground, primary, secondary, borders, charts, sidebar) in OKLCH color space.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, 'Farm Bridge' title, root div for React mounting, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with 11 routes (home, dashboard, marketplace, knowledge hub, registrations, listings, requests, salary, PF, assistance), wrapped in ThemeProvider and Layout with Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AssistanceReques: Displays an assistance request in a card format with status badges, type labels, description, submission date, and attached images. Includes helper functions to format dates and map enum values to human-readable labels.

Form component for submitting assistance requests with fields for assistance type, description, and optional image uploads. Uses react-hook-form for validation and submits data via a custom hook, navigating to my-requests on success.
frontend/src/components/ChatMessage.tsx: Renders a single chat message bubble with timestamp, styled differently for user vs assistant messages. Formats timestamps from backend Time type to human-readable format.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A floating chat widget with toggle button that displays chat history and allows sending messages. Features a scrollable message area, input field with Enter-to-send, and uses custom hooks for fetching history and sending messages.
frontend/src/components/CreateListingFor: Form for creating marketplace listings with fields for crop type, quantity, price, and organic certification checkbox. Validates inputs and calls createListing mutation, showing toast notifications for success/error.
frontend/src/components/CTAButton.tsx: A styled call-to-action button component that wraps the base Button with gradient styling and enhanced shadows. Forwards all props and ref to the underlying Button component.
frontend/src/components/GeographicDirect: Displays geographic distribution of farmers and institutions across rural and urban regions with summary statistics. Shows region cards with district breakdowns using mock data derived from total counts.
frontend/src/components/ImageUploader.ts: Multi-image upload component with preview thumbnails, progress tracking, and remove functionality. Converts files to ExternalBlob format with upload progress callbacks and enforces a maximum image limit.
frontend/src/components/InsuranceCoverag: Displays insurance plan details (coverage amount, monthly premium, plan type) in a card with color-coded badges for basic/premium/comprehensive plans.
frontend/src/components/KnowledgeArticle: Renders a knowledge article card with topic badge, title, excerpt, and a dialog modal to read the full article content.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Dropdown menu component for selecting language (English, Spanish, French, Hindi) with flag icons and globe button trigger.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with navigation sidebar, authentication handling, user profile setup modal, and conditional navigation links for farmers/institutions including chat widget and language selector.
frontend/src/components/MetricCard.tsx: Reusable card component displaying a metric with icon, label, value, and optional subtitle in a hover-animated card.
frontend/src/components/PFStatementTable: Table component displaying provident fund history records sorted by year/month with contributions, withdrawals, interest, and balance columns.
frontend/src/components/ProduceListingCa: Card displaying produce listing details (crop, quantity, price, organic badge) with request modal for institutions and delete functionality for listing owners.
frontend/src/components/RegionCard.tsx: Expandable card showing regional statistics (farmers, institutions) with collapsible district-level breakdown.
frontend/src/components/RequestProduceMo: Modal dialog component for requesting produce from a listing, with form validation for quantity and integration with the useRequestProduce mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RuralUrbanFlowVi: Visual component displaying the flow from rural farmers to urban farmers to institutions using icons, arrows, and statistics.
frontend/src/components/SalaryHistoryTab: Table component displaying salary records sorted by year and month, showing base salary, bonuses, compensation, and payment dates.
frontend/src/components/SectionHeading.t: Reusable heading component with configurable heading levels (h1/h2/h3), optional subtitle, and children support.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileSetup: Profile setup form allowing users to enter their name and select user type (farmer, institution, or other) with mutation integration.
frontend/src/data/knowledgeContent.ts: Static content data for knowledge articles covering organic farming topics like pest control, soil health, and water conservation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, handling identity changes and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend API interactions including user profiles, farmer/institution registration, produce listings, compensation, PF accounts, assistance requests, and dashboard metrics. Each hook uses the actor from useActor and manages query/mutation state with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for light/dark themes using modern professional color palette (blues, teals, cyans). Defines CSS custom properties for colors, semantic tokens (success, warning, info), and typography utility classes (headings, body, captions).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/AssistanceRequestPage: Page component displaying a form for farmers to request assistance (technical support, post-harvest management, etc.) with a section heading, card layout, and assistance workflow illustration.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing platform metrics including total farmers, institutions, produce listings, organic listings percentage, geographic distribution via GeographicDirectory component, and organic adoption statistics with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/FarmerRegistrationPag: Farmer registration form page collecting farm details (name, location, size, farming methods, crop types) with validation and submission via useRegisterFarmer mutation, redirecting to marketplace on success.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section promoting the farmer employment platform, conditional CTAs based on authentication and registration status, and features section highlighting comprehensive farmer support services.
frontend/src/pages/InstitutionRegistrati: Institution registration form page that allows institutions (temples, schools, colleges, etc.) to register by providing name, type, and interested crops, then navigates to marketplace on success.
frontend/src/pages/KnowledgeHubPage.tsx: Knowledge hub page displaying organic farming educational articles filtered by topics (basics, pest control, soil health, water management, benefits) with an FAQ accordion section.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Main marketplace page showing produce listings with organic/all filter tabs; farmers can create listings via dialog, institutions can browse, includes hero image and empty state handling.
frontend/src/pages/MyListingsPage.tsx: Farmer-specific page for managing their own produce listings with ability to create new listings through a dialog form and view all existing listings in a grid.
frontend/src/pages/MyRequestsPage.tsx: User requests page that displays assistance requests for farmers or produce requests for institutions, with loading states and empty state handling.
frontend/src/pages/PFAccountPage.tsx: Provident Fund account page displaying total balance, contributions, interest earned, and yearly statement history with metric cards and a summary table.
frontend/src/pages/SalaryDashboardPage.t: React page component that displays a farmer's salary dashboard with compensation metrics, payment history, insurance coverage, and provident fund information using cards and tables.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, typography with Inter and Poppins fonts, custom shadows, and container settings.
project_state.json: Project metadata file documenting the global agriculture platform's architecture, features, and requirements for connecting rural farmers with urban institutions for organic produce distribution.
